title: Job Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
